news.t: John Hancock Investment Management Launches New Active International Equity ETF Subadvised by Boston Partners

holdings.infoBox: JDVI is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 5.47%, Kinross Gold at 4.79%, Novartis AG at 4.36%, Roche Holding AG at 4.01%, and Nutrien at 3.95%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Disciplined Value International Select ETF (JDVI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to undervalued large- and mid-cap equities issued outside the US. JDVI was launched on Dec 19, 2023 and is issued by John Hancock.

data.title: John Hancock Investment Management Launches New Active International Equity ETF Subadvised by Boston Partners
data.text: BOSTON , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ - John Hancock Investment Management, a company of Manulife Investment Management, today will launch John Hancock Disciplined Value International Select ETF (NYSE A...
